'''gadomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hubnerite|hubnerite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-d-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hubnerite|hubnerite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gadomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gædemeth|gædemeth]] || [[word:gædemej|gædemej]] || [[word:gædemesh|gædemesh]] || [[word:gædeme|gædeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gadodomoth|gadodomoth]] || [[word:gadodomoj|gadodomoj]] || [[word:gadodomosh|gadodomosh]] || [[word:gadodomo|gadodomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gadomoth|gadomoth]] || [[word:gadomoj|gadomoj]] || [[word:gadomosh|gadomosh]] || [[word:gadomo|gadomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadofmoth|gadofmoth]] || [[word:gadofmoj|gadofmoj]] || [[word:gadofmosh|gadofmosh]] || [[word:gadofmof|gadofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gadomotho|gadomotho]] || [[word:gadomojo|gadomojo]] || [[word:gadomosho|gadomosho]] || [[word:gadomoko|gadomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gadomoth|gadomoth]] || [[word:gadomoj|gadomoj]] || [[word:gadomosh|gadomosh]] || [[word:gadomo|gadomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gadomothol|gadomothol]] || [[word:gadomojol|gadomojol]] || [[word:gadomoshol|gadomoshol]] || [[word:gadomokol|gadomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gadomothotho|gadomothotho]] || [[word:gadomojojo|gadomojojo]] || [[word:gadomoshosho|gadomoshosho]] || [[word:gadomoko|gadomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gadomothon|gadomothon]] || [[word:gadomojon|gadomojon]] || [[word:gadomoshon|gadomoshon]] || [[word:gadomokon|gadomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gadomothoro|gadomothoro]] || [[word:gadomojoro|gadomojoro]] || [[word:gadomoshoro|gadomoshoro]] || [[word:gadomokoro|gadomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
